summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard conservatively from the hydrated preflight artifact. No shared canonical was selected; the non-security seed PRs are independent open work items, not duplicate/low-signal closeout candidates. No close, merge, fix, or fix-PR actions are planned because the job permissions disable instant close, low-signal closeout, merge, and fix PRs. Security-sensitive PR refs are routed exactly to central security handling without affecting unrelated non-security classifications.

actions.reason: Useful focused contributor PR, but not a duplicate or low-signal target and not merge-ready under the artifact checks.
Independent feature/API PR requiring technical review; keep open rather than close or route into another canonical path.
Focused bug-fix PR with unresolved bot review/proof blockers; keep open as independent work rather than closing or merging.
Related to a live bug report but not a duplicate/closeout candidate in this inventory shard; keep open for maintainer review.
Independent focused feature PR with review history; keep open because no closeout basis exists.
Independent session-state feature PR, not a duplicate or low-signal cleanup target.
Independent narrow documentation/test PR; keep open because it is not low-signal and needs maintainer review/update.
Independent focused bug-fix PR; keep open for maintainer review because merge/fix actions are not permitted.
Route the exact security-sensitive PR to central OpenClaw security handling; do not mutate or summarize further in this cluster.
Independent feature/bug-fix PR tied to an open issue; keep open for maintainer review rather than closing or treating as fixed.
Route the exact security-sensitive linked PR to central OpenClaw security handling; do not mutate or summarize further in this cluster.
